metadata.title: Enrique Becerra — Web development for freelancers and SMBs
metadata.description: Tech Architect Lead specialized in Next.js, Sanity CMS and modern web architectures. I help freelancers and small businesses build a professional digital presence.
metadata.ogDescription: Tech Architect Lead. Websites built with architectural rigor for freelancers and SMBs.
metadata.twitterDescription: Tech Architect Lead. Websites built with architectural rigor.

hero.lead: No templates, no agencies that don't return your calls. A web architect thinking about your business.

services.title: What I build for you
services.lead: Concrete offerings with scope and indicative pricing from the first conversation. All born from real enterprise projects, scaled to your business.

case.placeholderBody: The clients I work with do so under contract and I can't show them publicly here. I'm happy to share specific references on your preferred channel after a first conversation.

about.title: A bit about who's building
about.bio1: I'm Enrique Becerra. For 8+ years I've built corporate websites, government portals and intranets for organizations that can't afford their web to fail.
about.bio2: I now bring that same rigor to freelancers and SMBs: websites your team can maintain on their own, that integrate with the tools you already use, and that keep working as you grow. The difference is size, not how we work.

process.title: From idea to live site in 4 steps
process.lead: No endless consulting, no invoice surprises. A short, honest and measurable path from first call to the point where your team runs the site on its own.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.lead: Tell me what you need and I'll reply within 24 business hours with a first take on scope.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell me briefly what you need
contact.formSuccess: Message sent. I'll reply within 24 business hours.
contact.formError: Failed to send. Try emailing me at contacto@ebecerra.es instead.

footer.tagline: Tech Architect Lead bringing enterprise experience to SMB scale. Websites your team can maintain, integrated with your tools, that keep working as you grow.
